description_long: This is a classic black fedora hat featuring a wide, flat brim and a distinctively shaped crown with a gentle slope and rounded edges. The hat is adorned with a prominent, smooth white band encircling the base of the crown, providing a striking contrast to the deep black felt material. The crown is moderately tall and slightly asymmetrical, giving it a stylish, urban flair. The brim is even and extends outward, offering both shade and a touch of elegance. The surface appears to be made of soft felt or wool, with a matte finish and minimal texture. This hat is typically worn as a fashionable accessory in urban environments, suitable for both casual and semi-formal occasions.
description: A black fedora hat with a wide, flat brim and a white band around the crown, made of soft felt with a matte finish.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the rounded, gently sloped crown and the full circular brim with the white band clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the asymmetrical slope of the crown and the continuous white band around the base.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the symmetrical front of the crown, the even brim, and the prominent white band.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the crown's slope and the white band from a different perspective.
